stemHtml: It is important not to fly with a cold or flu because…

options.a: If one Eustachian tube is blocked, it can lead to dizziness and affect balance.
options.b: Sinus barotrauma can cause hearing loss, especially in ascents at low altitude.
options.c: Otic barotrauma can rupture eardrums, especially in ascents at high altitude.
options.d: Dental barotrauma can commonly cause pain, especially in rapid descents.
